Product Tabs

Description

How to

A powerful solution to clean fabric upholstery. Its formula has been designed to remove dirt, stains and odor effectively and safely on all types of fabrics. It will leave the interior fresh, clean and ready for protection with Q² FabricCoat.

Q²M FabricCleaner might be used as a one-step cleaner (via brush and microfiber) or as an effective pre-spray for wet cleaning with an extraction vacuum cleaner. It cleanses but also prepares textiles prior to coating with Q² FabricCoat.

## Features and Benefits

- Powerful cleaning formula that removes even the toughest stains

- Safe and effective on all types of fabric, including delicate textiles

- Easy to use, with no residue or odor left behind

- Leaves surfaces looking clean and refreshed

Gyeon Q²MFabric Cleaner is the ultimate solution for maintaining your vehicle's interior fabrics. This powerful cleaner is specially formulated to remove even the toughest dirt and stains, leaving your carpets, upholstery, and mats looking clean and refreshed.

What sets Gyeon Q²M Fabric Cleaner apart is its versatility. This cleaner is safe and effective on all types of fabric, including delicate textiles such as Alcantara. Unlike other fabric cleaners that can leave a residue or odor behind, Gyeon Q²M Fabric Cleaner leaves no trace after cleaning.

Gyeon Q²M FabricCleaner's long-lasting formula helps prevent future dirt and stains from sticking to the fabric, ensuring that your vehicle's interior remains looking clean for longer.

### Step 1: Preparation

First, remove any loose dirt or debris from the surface you wish to clean. If the fabric is particularly dirty, you may want to vacuum it first to remove any large particles.

### Step 2: Application

Spray the Gyeon Q2M Fabric Cleaner directly onto the fabric, ensuring an even coverage. For tough stains, you may need to apply a little more product and agitate the area with a soft-bristled brush or microfiber towel.

### Step 3: Agitation

Using a soft-bristled brush or microfiber towel, gently agitate the cleaner into the fabric. Pay particular attention to any areas that are heavily soiled or stained. Allow the cleaner to penetrate the fabric for a few minutes.

### Step 4: Extraction

Using a wet/dry vacuum or a damp microfiber towel, extract the cleaner from the fabric. Ensure that you remove all the cleaner to prevent any residue from drying onto the fabric.

### Step 5: Drying

Allow the fabric to dry completely before using it again. You can speed up the drying process by using a fan or opening a window to allow air to circulate.
